rows.label: tev000992_MSG0001
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0002
rows.name:
I've just had a revelation while looking
at this dog. Will you hear me out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0003
rows.name:
Despite the valiant efforts of the
Interceptor Union, indigens remain
as persistent a threat as ever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0004
rows.name:
The gates of NLA have stood strong so far,
but they are by no means impregnable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0005
rows.name:
You know the dog guardian statues of the East? I think
we should install one on either side of the gates,
thereby warding off beasts with the Buddha's power.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev000992_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev000992_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that guardian statues
should be installed.

rows.label: qev000992_JNK0020
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev000992_SEL0021
rows.name: Correct his ideas about the statues.

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0006
rows.name:
I knew you would perceive
the wisdom of my plan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0007
rows.name:
Then our first step should be
researching eastern texts to learn
how these statues are engineered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Hmm? Yes, engineered. Guardian dogs
are powerful defensive weapons that have
protected temples since ancient times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0009
rows.name:
They repel invaders by emitting
blinding beams of divine lights
from their mouths. ...Er, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0010
rows.name:
Hmm... It seems from the look on your
face that I may have misunderstood their
specific defensive capabilities.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0011
rows.name:
...What? The statues are mere
superstition, you say? And they
aren't even dogs, but lions?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0012
rows.name:
Lions... I see... Well, I suppose
placing lions at defensively significant
locations is equally inspired.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0013
rows.name:
Truly, the mysticism of the
East is beyond compare![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0014
rows.name:
I thank you for your correction,
and bow to your extensive
knowledge of the subject.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0015
rows.name:
I am always looking for ways
to harness the power of the
Buddha to NLA's benefit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0016
rows.name:
Sadly, I haven't yet found a good
way of doing so. Perhaps this
sort of thing is not my forte.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0017
rows.name: Ah, but it might be yours![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0018
rows.name:
Well then? How can we illuminate
this city with the light and
love of the Buddha?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev000992_JNK0030
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev000992_SEL0031
rows.name:
Suggest building a giant
Buddha at NLA's center.

rows.label: qev000992_JNK0040
rows.name: Correct

rows.label: qev000992_SEL0041
rows.name:
Fill your heart with love and tell
Boze Rose that is not the way.

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0019
rows.name:
Oh ho! Now that is a grand idea. Better
yet, let's build it as a giant Doll
that can move and fight as needed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0020
rows.name:
Then it can serve as the city's guardian
both literally AND figuratively![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0021
rows.name:
I'd better go find Secretary Nagi and Commander
Vandham and propose this to them directly. We
will call it...Project N.I.R.V.A.N.A![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0022
rows.name:
And once the mega-Buddha Doll
N.I.R.V.A.N.A. is complete, I want you
to be my co-pilot in the defense of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0023
rows.name:
Oh... Just now, as the light cast
a halo behind you, I saw a vision
of the Buddha upon your face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0024
rows.name:
But of course. That's my answer. The Buddha's
path is not about physical things—it's about
finding enlightenment within each of us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0025
rows.name:
What a fool I've been! We
never needed such things as
lions and dogs and statues![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0026
rows.name:
Thank you. I will remember this teaching of the
Buddha forever, and use it to protect NLA by
pulverizing all who would stand against us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000992_MSG0027
rows.name:
And I'll be counting on you
to watch over me with that
uncanny, Buddha-like gaze.[ST:wait ]
